reaches DON consensus on confidence/platform/direction, and writes
signed reports to SignalRegistry.sol on Ethereum Sepolia.

commit.message:
refactor(brand): use lucide icon for logo (#30)

* refactor(orb): particle-based orb with gravitational dot grid

Replace the solid shader orb with a particle-based design inspired
by the reference image:

- Sphere of ~1000 cyan square particles (fibonacci distribution)
- Flat dot grid plane with gravitational well deformation
- Subtle wave ripples emanating from the orb center
- Three animation states preserved (idle/active/listening)
- Removed unused GLSL shader files (orb.vert.ts, orb.frag.ts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(design): harmonize colors and Resend-inspired UI polish

Research-driven color system overhaul for better readability and
reduced eye strain:

Surfaces: switch from blue-tinted (#0a0a0f) to neutral Zinc scale
(#09090b, #18181b, #27272a) — eliminates cold alien feel.

Text: adopt Zinc hierarchy (#f4f4f5, #a1a1aa, #71717a) with WCAG AA
contrast ratios (15.4:1, 7.0:1, 4.6:1 on surface-0).

Borders: neutral Zinc (#27272a, #3f3f46) instead of purple-tinted.

Glows: reduce opacity 50% across all glow shadows — subtle ambient
lighting instead of aggressive neon.

Buttons (Resend-inspired):
- Primary: white bg, black text, hover to white/90 — bold and clean
- Secondary: glass effect with border-white/10, backdrop-blur
- Removed cyan glow on hover from all interactive elements

Cards: rounded-2xl (Resend-style), remove shadow-sm for flatter look.
Glass: bg-white/5 with 25px blur (matches Resend CTA treatment).
Landing: cleaner hero with gradient only on "WhatsApp" keyword.

Sources:
- Resend.com UI patterns (glass buttons, white-on-black hierarchy)
- WCAG 2.1 AA contrast guidelines (4.5:1 minimum)
- Material Dark Theme guidance (#121212 base, desaturate accents)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(brand): replace custom SVG logo with lucide BotMessageSquare icon

Simplifies logo component by using an existing lucide-react icon instead
of a hand-crafted SVG, keeping the accent-cyan color from the design system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix streaming timeout — use Connection: close for Lambda Web Adapter

Connection: keep-alive caused the Lambda Web Adapter to wait for the
HTTP server to close the connection, resulting in 300s timeouts on every
request (even after data was delivered). Connection: close signals the
adapter to finalize the response immediately.

Add data pipeline: Oura API client, sync, and 90-day backfill

- Typed Oura API client with automatic token refresh and pagination
- Sync logic fetches sleep periods, daily sleep, and daily readiness
- Upserts to DB (insert or update on conflict)
- POST /api/oura/backfill - pull last 90 days of data
- POST /api/oura/sync - pull last 7 days of data
- Backfill and manual sync buttons on settings page
- Sync history logged to sync_log table

commit.message:
fix: force evaluate_depth after each research round

Small models (qwen3.5:9b) never voluntarily call evaluate_depth —
they default to productive tools (search, fetch) and skip the
meta-cognitive one. Now after each round's tool calls, if
evaluate_depth wasn't called, we force a separate inference with
only evaluate_depth available as a tool. If that also fails,
default to depth=3 (surface level, keep going).

Also adds per-round debug stats: searched N, fetched N → depth X/10.

Adds `ironmunch index-repo <url> [--no-ai]` to reindex a GitHub repo from
the CLI. Adds a post-push hook that auto-detects the GitHub remote and
reindexes it after each push, keeping the remote index current alongside
the local index updated by post-commit.

feat: Phase 2 — retirement target tracker + NW milestones (#5)

* feat: Phase 2 — retirement target tracker + NW milestones (#5)

Add retirement settings (singleton table, GET/POST /api/retirement),
milestone markers on NW chart (amber dashed ReferenceLines), and three
new components: RetirementPanel (form + save), MilestoneEditor
(add/remove milestone rows), RetirementSummary (nest egg, projected
amount, on/off track). Includes retirementMath utility with
computeNestEgg, generateProjectionSeries, mergeHistoryWithProjection.

63 new tests (16 backend + 47 frontend). All 719 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address staff engineer review — 7 findings

- Add lower bound + type validation for all numeric fields (withdrawal_rate,
  expected_return, monthly_contribution, desired_income, inflation_rate,
  social_security_annual) via _validate_numeric helper
- Add inflation_rate_pct and social_security_annual validation (were unvalidated)
- Guard milestone items are dicts before calling .get()
- Fix Number(val) || null coercing valid zero to null — use explicit empty check
- Use index-based key for milestone ReferenceLines (prevents duplicate key)
- Surface save errors to user via error prop on RetirementPanel
- Use validated variables in SQL params instead of raw body.get()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix chat: strip pre-search preamble, enforce brevity

Two issues from first live test:
1. Model generates "I don't have real-time data" text BEFORE web search
   runs server-side, then gives actual data after. Both text blocks get
   joined and sent. Fix: only extract text blocks after the last
   web_search_tool_result, dropping the pre-search disclaimer.
2. Responses way too long. Tightened system prompt: max 4-6 bullets,
   no essays, no disclaimers, no follow-up questions. Search first,
   respond with findings.

commit.message:
feat: v0.6.0 — effect registry, DTD validator, templates, audio, compound clips

8 features, 6 new MCP tools (47→53), 70 new tests (501→571):

- Effect Resource Registry: 15+ FCP transitions with UUIDs, list_effects()
- Standard Timebase Enforcement: snap_to_frame(), is_standard_timebase()
- Pre-export DTD Validator: 6 sub-checks (element order, attrs, timebases, frame alignment, effect refs, asset sources)
- media-rep Default: shared _create_asset_element() helper using FCP-preferred media-rep child
- Still Image Auto-Conversion: ffmpeg-based PNG/JPG→ProRes MOV for FCP compatibility
- Audio Support: add_audio_clip(), add_music_bed() with hierarchical roles and negative lanes
- Compound Clip Generation: create_compound_clip(), flatten_compound_clip() with ref-clip
- Template System: 3 built-in templates (intro_outro, lower_thirds, music_video), slot-based

commit.message:
FEEDBACK 4건 처리: 검색제거 + 타입드롭다운 + 활동로그 + 품목관리

1. 주관사 홈 검색바/정렬 드롭다운 제거
2. 활동로그: 로그인/회원가입/행사생성/수정/입장에 로그 기록 추가
3. 고객 타입선택: 팝업 -> 드롭다운 (서버에서 타입목록 가져옴)
4. 품목 관리 시스템:
   - 주관사: 품목 추가 화면 (품목명/참가비/수수료/이미지)
   - 업체: 참여코드 입장 후 품목 선택 드롭다운 + 선점
   - 선점된 품목은 다른 업체에게 안 보임
   - 남은 품목 없으면 참여 불가 안내
   - Product.vendorId nullable로 변경 (DB 마이그레이션)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: v0.4.0 — agent-grade memory with TODO tracking, export/import, improved dedup

4 new tools (7 → 11 total):
- memory_status: TODO status management (pending → in_progress → done)
- memory_export: JSON backup of all project memories
- memory_import: bulk import from JSON for restore/migration
- memory_cleanup: archive done TODOs, delete stale low-importance memories

Improvements:
- Dedup threshold lowered 0.9 → 0.85 with content-length ratio check
- Session linking: session_id tracked on every stored memory
- Usage analytics: hit_count + last_accessed_at per memory
- Schema auto-migration: existing v0.3.x databases upgrade seamlessly
- memory_init shows TODO status in summary, filters out completed items

18 tests passing (was 14). TypeScript strict. Build clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
